name: proxy-max
description: Local-first multi-provider AI gateway with protocol translation, account routing, media APIs, proxy pools, and a secure operations dashboard.
author: Tasadduq Burney

scripts.unified:parity:gate: npm run verify:upstream && node test-unified-source.js && npm run test:parity && npm run verify:parity
scripts.verify:full: npm run unified:parity:gate && npm run test:unified && npm run unified:build && npm run unified:doctor && npm run unified:smoke && npm test
scripts.package:verify: npm test && npm run verify:parity && npm run package:test
scripts.test: node test-security.js && node test-security-integration.js && node test-pool-routing.js && node test-pool-api.js && node test-unified-source.js && node test-unified-runtime.js && node test-unified-recovery.js && node test-unified-migration.js && node test-unified-migration-integration.js && node test-unified-api-security.js && node test-compat.js && node test-token-counter.js && node test-optimizer-idempotency.js && node test-prose-determinism.js && node test-tool-json-repair.js

comments.sqlite: Persistence uses Node's built-in node:sqlite (Node >=22.5) with an automatic JSON fallback on older runtimes — no native module to compile.
comments.undici: Auto-installed on first use if not present; the proxy falls back gracefully if it can't be installed.
